html:
Exclusive to:

The Horned Helmet is a wearable Armor Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC, crafted in the Fight Tab. It requires 1 Horn, 4 Seashells and 1 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It has 600 durability, absorbs 85% of physical damage, and protects against Poison from direct attacks, for example by being hit by a Poison Snake, a Poison Mosquito, a Spider Warrior or a Yellow Crocodog. It also grants 35% Wetness resistance.

Trivia

  • Horned Helmets were introduced in the Release the Quacken update.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Willow wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wendy wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • WX-78 wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Woodie wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wes wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Maxwell wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Webber wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Walani wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Warly wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wilbur wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wilba wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wormwood wearing a Horned Helmet.
  • Wheeler wearing a Horned Helmet.

“Nice and dry. This helmet will protect me from the elements.”
–Wilson
“Ox-cellent!”
–Willow
“I have become more mighty!”
–Wolfgang
“Dashing.”
–Wendy
“MAMMALIAN-DERIVED HELMET”
–WX-78
“A sturdy head covering.”
–Wickerbottom
“This is a hat befitting a Northerner.”
–Woodie
“Sometimes one must sacrifice form for function.”
–Maxwell
“The water resistant properties of the aquatic bound bovine have transfered to this headgear.”
–Wagstaff
“This helm will keep my scalp dry.”
–Wigfrid
“How do we look?”
–Webber
“I hope it doesn't mess up my ponytails.”
–Walani
“Much more waterproof than a chef's hat.”
–Warly
“'Tis a hat o'th'ox.”
–Woodlegs
“LOOKETH GOOD ON MINE HEAD”
–Wilba
“Ear branches?”
–Wormwood
“All the rage with the 'not dying' crowd.”
–Wheeler
The Horned Helmet is a wearable Armor Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC, crafted in the Fight Tab. It requires 1 Horn, 4 Seashells and 1 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It has 600 durability, absorbs 85% of physical damage, and protects against Poison from direct attacks, for example by being hit by a Poison Snake, a Poison Mosquito, a Spider Warrior or a Yellow Crocodog. It also grants 35% Wetness resistance.

Horned Helmets were introduced in the Release the Quacken update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Sừng là một Vật phẩm Giáp có thể đeo được độc quyền trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked, được chế tạo trong Thẻ Chiến đấu. Nó cần 1 Sừng, 4 Vỏ Sò và 1 Dây Thừng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó có độ bền 600, hấp thụ 85% sát thương vật lý và bảo vệ khỏi chất độc khỏi các cuộc tấn công trực tiếp, chẳng hạn như bị trúng độc bởi Rắn độc, Muỗi độc, Chiến binh nhện hoặc Cá sấu vàng. Nó cũng cho khả năng chống ẩm ướt 35%.

The '''Horned Helmet''' is a wearable [[Armor]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, crafted in the [[Fight Tab]]. It requires 1 [[Horn]], 4 [[Seashell]]s and 1 [[Rope]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. It has 600 durability, absorbs 85% of physical damage, and protects against [[Poison]] from direct attacks, for example by being hit by a [[Snake|Poison Snake]], a [[Poison Mosquito]], a [[Spider/Warrior|Spider Warrior]] or a [[Crocodog#Yellow Crocodog|Yellow Crocodog]]. It also grants 35% [[Wetness]] resistance.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Horned Helmets were introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#February 25, 2016 - Release the Quacken Update|Release the Quacken]]'' update.
